name: crypto-bank-account
description: A smart contract for a crypto bank account on Ethereum

scripts.deploy:sepolia: node scripts/check-env.js && hardhat run scripts/deployTicketSale.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:bank:sepolia: node scripts/check-env.js && hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia
scripts.seed:sepolia: node scripts/check-env.js && hardhat run scripts/seedTicketSale.js --network sepolia
